Keep the issue open as covered by the canonical repair PR, with closure deferred until a landed fix exists.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #94016 so stale pending channel tasks created by recovery stop timeout do not trap later health-monitor/start passes. Preserve the first recovery pass that marks restartPending, but on a subsequent recoveryStartRequested pass remove the stale task/abort bookkeeping and continue into normal channel startup.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): resume channel after pending task recovery
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
Repair the channel recovery path from #94016 so a stale task left behind after a recovery stop timeout does not keep a channel permanently stopped. The first recovery monitor/start pass should still mark restart pending and return, while a later pass that observes recoveryStartRequested should clear stale task bookkeeping and continue into normal channel startup.

Fixes #94008.

Credit: based on the source PR #94016 from @sheyanmin, with issue report attribution to @thomasthelen-kibeauftragter.

## Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-channels.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review before merge consideration
credit_notes: Preserve #94016 contributor credit for @sheyanmin in the repaired PR branch or PR body.
Run Codex /review after the repair and address any findings before merge consideration.
